selections.name: Relevate
selections.reason: Drops in class and boasts the highest speed and class figures in the field. Should get a favorable pressing trip.

selections.name: Crystal Frost
selections.reason: Shows good early speed and has competitive figures for this level. Can control the pace from the inside.

selections.name: Kyler
selections.reason: Has shown flashes of ability and gets Irad Ortiz Jr. in the irons, which is a major positive.

selections.name: Berlinwin
selections.reason: Consistent presser who can pick up the pieces if the pace gets too hot up front.

danger_horse.name: Let 'er Sizzle
danger_horse.reason: Outside draw keeps her out of trouble; has the class to contend if she improves second off the layoff.

selections.name: Bon Voyage
selections.reason: First-time starter for Michael Maker with Irad Ortiz Jr. aboard. Works suggest she is ready to fire at first asking.

selections.name: Cross Power
selections.reason: Has the experience edge over most of the field and posted a solid 86 speed figure on debut.

selections.name: Icebreak
selections.reason: Well-bred firster for Timothy Hamm with Jose Ortiz taking the mount. Solid work tab.

selections.name: Clonmacnoise
selections.reason: Another promising first-time starter with a decent pedigree for early speed.

danger_horse.name: Camping Siete
danger_horse.reason: Has a race under his belt and could improve significantly with the experience.

selections.name: Warrior Richard
selections.reason: Massive speed figure advantage (111) and gets the rail for the route. Should control the pace and be tough to catch.

selections.name: Dai Vernon
selections.reason: Strong presser with a 107 speed figure. Will get first run at the leader if the pace is honest.

selections.name: Notary
selections.reason: Consistent closer/presser who will benefit from the long stretch if the front-runners duel.

selections.name: Saltwater Cowboy
selections.reason: Has back class and tactical speed to sit a good trip from the outside post.

danger_horse.name: C F V Bullet
danger_horse.reason: Capable of popping a big figure on his best day and could hit the board at a price.

selections.name: Banana Frost
selections.reason: First-time starter for Brian Lynch. Shows excellent morning works and gets Jose Ortiz.

selections.name: Voyager
selections.reason: Mark Casse trainee debuting with Irad Ortiz Jr. Pedigree suggests she will be ready early.

selections.name: Violent Gal
selections.reason: Ian Wilkes firster with Brian Hernandez Jr. Has a solid series of breezes leading up to this.

selections.name: Broadway Tootsie
selections.reason: Joe Sharp debutante with Axel Concepcion. Sharp is capable of having them ready first out.

danger_horse.name: Lookin' Pretty
danger_horse.reason: Has the benefit of a prior start, which is a big advantage against a field of mostly firsters.

selections.name: Lil Tipsy
selections.reason: Strong class rating (105) and speed (102). Gets Irad Ortiz Jr. and looks primed for a top effort.

selections.name: Solaia
selections.reason: Drops in class and boasts a field-high 114 class rating. Will be flying late.

selections.name: Shot At Perfection
selections.reason: Consistent figures (101 speed/class) and draws well inside to save ground.

selections.name: Brandie
selections.reason: Has flashed high speed (105) in the past and could wire the field if left alone.

danger_horse.name: Angel From Marin
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a big run on her best day and adds value to the exotics.

selections.name: Risk Manager
selections.reason: Highest speed figure on the turf (117). Michael Maker and Florent Geroux are a lethal combination on the grass.

selections.name: Sugoi
selections.reason: Very consistent performer with a 113 speed figure. Should get a great stalking trip.

selections.name: Out Of Deductions
selections.reason: Draws the rail and has strong figures (113 speed). Will save all the ground.

selections.name: Demolition Duke
selections.reason: Solid class and speed. Can close into a hot pace.

danger_horse.name: Presider
danger_horse.reason: If he draws in from the AE list, his 115 speed figure makes him an immediate threat.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #3, Exacta Box 3-6, Trifecta 3,6 / 1,3,6,9 / ALL

selections.name: Send Cash
selections.reason: Posted a massive 120 speed figure recently. Even with a regression, he outclasses this field.

selections.name: Capital Connection
selections.reason: Strong closer with a 110 class rating. Will benefit from the long Churchill Downs stretch.

selections.name: Cool Cowboy
selections.reason: Consistent speed and class figures. Draws outside and should get a clean stalking trip.

selections.name: Guardian
selections.reason: Has the rail and Irad Ortiz Jr. Will be forwardly placed and dangerous.

danger_horse.name: Colonel Caliente
danger_horse.reason: Capable of hitting the board at a price with his late run.

selections.name: Rothko
selections.reason: Brad Cox trainee with Irad Ortiz Jr. Strong 112 class rating and looks ready to dominate.

selections.name: Touchy
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field (116). Will be closing hard late.

selections.name: John Hancock
selections.reason: Posted a 115 speed figure. If he repeats that effort, he will be right there at the wire.

selections.name: Bullard
selections.reason: Solid 112 speed figure and gets Florent Geroux. Dangerous from the outside.

danger_horse.name: Inexorable
danger_horse.reason: Consistent figures and draws well inside to save ground.

selections.name: Lady Jancis
selections.reason: Boasts a field-high 115 speed figure and gets Irad Ortiz Jr. Looks like a standout.

selections.name: Last Curtain Call
selections.reason: Very consistent with 106 speed and class ratings. Should get a great trip from the inside.

selections.name: Mundy Sweep
selections.reason: Solid figures and Corey Lanerie knows this turf course well.

selections.name: Heitzgirl
selections.reason: Has flashed a 105 speed figure and can contend if she brings her best.

danger_horse.name: Toast The Star
danger_horse.reason: If she draws in from the AE list, her 110 speed and 111 class make her a major player.
